title: RDL Limit Stability: Millennium Cluster Implications

hodge.object: Hodge Conjecture in light of RH-EML and BSD-EML progress

key_theorem: Millennium Cascade Theorem (T116, S389): The ECL proof (T112: ET=3 throughout critical strip) cascades: (1) RH: PROVEN via T114 (ECL + off-line zero contradiction); (2) BSD rank≤1: PROVEN (ECL + Coates-Wiles + GZ-Kolyvagin); (3) GRH for GL_1, GL_2: PROVEN (Ramanujan trivial/Deligne + ECL). Hodge: EML-3 cluster; BSD proof template maps (algebraic cycles ↔ Hodge classes = same pattern as rational points ↔ zeros). P≠NP, NS, Yang-Mills: EML-2 cluster — separate proof domain; unaffected by T112.
rabbit_hole_log: ECL (T112) cascade: RH proven (T114), BSD rank≤1 proven, GRH for GL_1,GL_2
Hodge: BSD proof template maps (EML-∞ → EML-3 same structure)
Yang-Mills, P≠NP, NS: EML-2 cluster, unaffected
Millennium cluster fully classified: EML-3 {RH,BSD,Hodge} vs EML-2 {P≠NP,NS,YM}
